page: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-48 is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor using the x86_64 architecture. It features 48 dedicated virtual CPUs mapped to 24 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The instance is equipped with 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. Local storage is not bundled with this instance, and it does not include any GPU accelerators or complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

Performance benchmarks indicate strong capabilities in both single-core and multi-core processing, with stress-ng scores placing it in the top 25% of tested servers. Memory performance is a key strength, showing strong results in large-block read and write bandwidth tests, alongside a strong Passmark memory score. Cryptographic operations perform well, supported by hardware-accelerated AES, VAES, and SHA instruction sets. While general database operations and web serving throughput fall into the average tier, the server demonstrates strong performance in specific workloads such as small-model LLM text generation and physics simulations.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the n2d-highmem-48 offers a dense memory profile relative to its compute resources, making it a viable option for memory-intensive workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. The lack of integrated local storage means users must attach external block storage, which is a key architectural tradeoff. This instance is well-suited for large-scale in-memory databases, memory-bound enterprise applications, data processing pipelines, and multi-threaded simulation workloads.
description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-48 is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 48 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor on the x86_64 architecture. With 24 physical cores and hyper-threading, it delivers strong multi-core and single-core CPU performance, ranking in the top 25% in stress-ng benchmarks. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, requiring external storage attachments. It excels in memory bandwidth, showing strong large-block read and write speeds, as well as strong cryptographic execution via hardware-accelerated AES and SHA instruction sets. This hardware profile is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, including in-memory databases, large-scale data processing, and multi-threaded enterprise applications that demand high memory density without local storage requirements.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-48 is a memory-optimized server featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor, delivering strong multi-core and memory bandwidth performance.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform n2d-highmem-48 is a memory-optimized server with 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and AMD EPYC processors for memory-intensive workloads.
tagline: A memory-dense virtual server featuring forty-eight dedicated vCPUs and three hundred eighty-four gigabytes of RAM for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.

Powered by an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor with x86_64 architecture
Strong multi-core CPU performance and large-block memory bandwidth
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
